name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 Cream White & Blue Enamel Small】This Capucines Small bag features soft, muted tones that make the classic silhouette stand out. Exquisite chains link metal Monogram flowers, each cast, enameled, and hand-polished to shine with brilliant luster. The flap can be worn on the outside or tucked inside to reveal the LV logo. size:27x18x9cm
